briefing:
## 🌍 Top 5 Global Fintech News

- **[Fintech founder charged with fraud; AI app found to be humans in the Philippines](https://techcrunch.com/2025/04/10/fintech-founder-charged-with-fraud-after-ai-shopping-app-found-to-be-powered-by-humans-in-the-philippines/)** — *Hacker News* — A fintech founder faces fraud charges after their supposedly AI-powered shopping app was revealed to be operated by human workers in the Philippines.

- **[Americans see their savings vanish in Synapse fintech crisis](https://www.cnbc.com/2024/11/22/synapse-bankruptcy-thousands-of-americans-see-their-savings-vanish.html)** — *Hacker News* — Thousands of Americans lost access to their savings following the bankruptcy of fintech middleware company Synapse, raising urgent questions about consumer protections in embedded finance.

- **[Open Banking and Payments Competition](https://www.bitsaboutmoney.com/archive/open-banking-and-payments-competition/)** — *Hacker News* — A deep dive into how open banking frameworks are reshaping competition in the payments landscape globally.

- **[Apple acquires UK open banking startup Credit Kudos](https://ffnews.com/newsarticle/apple-acquires-uk-open-banking-startup-credit-kudos/)** — *Hacker News* — Apple's acquisition of Credit Kudos signals Big Tech's growing interest in leveraging open banking data for financial services.

- **[Fintech is making credit cards weirder](https://workweek.com/2022/08/05/fintech-is-making-credit-cards-weirder/)** — *Hacker News* — Fintech innovation is driving a wave of novel credit card products with unconventional rewards, structures, and underwriting models that challenge traditional banking norms.

---

## 🍁 Top 5 Canadian Fintech News

- **[RBC acquires Pinch Financial to streamline its mortgage process](https://betakit.com/rbc-acquires-pinch-financial-to-streamline-its-mortgage-process/)** — *BetaKit* — RBC has acquired Canadian mortgage fintech Pinch Financial in a move to digitize and accelerate its home lending operations.

- **[Canada's annual inflation rate fell to 1.8% in February, war's impact not yet reflected](https://www.cbc.ca/news/business/canada-annual-inflation-rate-february-2026-9.7130104?cmp=rss)** — *CBC Business* — Canada's inflation dropped to 1.8% in February 2026, though economists warn the economic fallout from the US-Israeli war with Iran has yet to be priced in.

- **[Canada's economy lost 84,000 jobs in February, unemployment rate ticked up to 6.7%](https://www.cbc.ca/news/business/canada-labour-force-survey-february-2026-9.7127105?cmp=rss)** — *CBC Business* — Canada shed 84,000 jobs in February as unemployment climbed to 6.7%, adding pressure on policymakers and financial institutions navigating an uncertain economic environment.

- **[Trump administration expands trade investigations to Canada, dozens of other countries](https://www.cbc.ca/news/business/trump-trade-investigation-canada-9.7127596?cmp=rss)** — *CBC Business* — The Trump administration has launched new trade investigations targeting Canada, raising concerns about further economic headwinds for Canadian businesses and financial markets.

- **[Canada calls screen scraping 'unsecure,' sets Open Banking target for 2023](https://finledger.com/2021/08/09/canada-sets-open-banking-target-for-2023/)** — *Hacker News* — *(Evergreen relevance)* Canada's push to replace screen scraping with secure open banking APIs remains a foundational reference point as the country continues to advance its consumer-driven banking framework.

---

## 🌊 Bonus: Relevant to Atlantic Fintech's Focus (1–3 articles)

- **[John Risley's CFFI Ventures moves $1.4-billion debt restructuring to Federal Court after creditor pushback](https://financialpost.com/fp-finance/john-risleys-cffi-ventures-debt-restructuring)** — *Financial Post* — Halifax-based entrepreneur John Risley's CFFI Ventures is escalating its $1.4-billion debt restructuring to Federal Court following pushback from creditors, a significant development for Atlantic Canada's business and investment community.

- **[Paving the way for a Canadian defence-tech boom](https://betakit.com/paving-the-way-for-a-canadian-defence-tech-boom/)** — *BetaKit* — As Canada ramps up defence spending, a growing defence-tech sector could open new venture capital and embedded finance opportunities relevant to Atlantic Canada's emerging tech ecosystem.
